positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic, abstract lion head and floral wreath combination, rendered in strong black ink lines against a pristine white background. The lion's silhouette should be highly graphic and symmetrical, incorporating geometric patterns within the mane and detailed, stylized laurel leaves that intertwine with the circlet. Use a single-line art aesthetic combined with heavy block coloring for contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. Style: Pop Art meets Neo-Traditional Tattoo Art. Lighting: High contrast studio lighting emphasizing clean edges. Color palette: Limited to black and white, with optional subtle gold foil accent accents in the wreath. Composition: Central, vertically oriented, suitable for chest or back placement. Print-friendly, vector-graphic quality.
negative: text, words, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, grain, noise, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, messy background, low quality, grayscale
